checks.finding: T-002 assigns AC-002 but omits prerequisite REQ-007, and T-003 assigns AC-007 but omits prerequisite REQ-006. An implementer could satisfy each task's declared Requirements while failing a requirement explicitly owned by its acceptance criterion.
REQ-001 through REQ-012 are each assigned to at least one task.
AC-001 through AC-014 are each assigned to at least one task.
Every task is anchored to declared requirements and acceptance criteria.
Every acceptance criterion is linked to a requirement and a planned task.
All six tasks begin with Approval: Draft and Status: Planned.
Each task declares Risk, Risk Rationale, and Required Workflow in the expected format.
No acceptance criterion is assigned to multiple tasks.
The dependency graph matches all task Blockers and orders shared integration surfaces transitively.
The verified dependency graph is acyclic.
Each task has one coherent implementation or integration concern.
Each task provides inspectable completion criteria, commands or fixtures, evidence artifacts, independent review, and rollback verification.
The traceability Task Mapping matches the Requirements and acceptance-criterion declarations in tasks.md.
